title: taraxacum medeense
intro: Taraxacum medeense, also known as the Iranian dandelion or Persian dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum medeense are thought to include the reduction of oxidative stress and inflammation, as well as the potential to support liver and kidney function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as a food ingredient in some cultures.
